titlestmt.titleproper: New York State College of Human Ecology Advisory council records23-21-2794
titlestmt.author: Compiled by College of Human Ecology Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-04-08 23:53:39 -0400.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: New York State College of Human Ecology Advisory council records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: New York State College of Human Ecology. Advisory Council

did.physdesc: Minutes, correspondence, biographical information, and published reports.
did.abstract: Minutes, correspondence, biographical information, and annual reports of the Advisory Council.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Minutes, correspondence, biographical information, and annual reports of the Advisory Council.

arrangement.head: SERIES LIST
arrangement.p: Series IV. 1960-1969 Box 1- Folders 8-18, 24-33, 35, 36; Box 2- Folders 1,2
Series VI. 1980-1989 Box 1- Folders 20-22, 37-40; Box 4- Folders 1-6
Series VII. 1990-1999 Box 4- Folders 5-13; Box 5- Folders 1-11
Series IX. Advisory Council Members Box 3

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: New York State College of Human Ecology Advisory Council records, #23-21-2794. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.corpname: New York State College of Home Economics
